semantic sentence of the question link to columns:
number of times a game went into overtime -> result

The question is asking to count how many games between the Eagles and Giants went into overtime. Since each row represents a game result and the "result" column indicates whether the game went into overtime (denoted by "(ot)"), we need to group by the "result" column to count the overtime occurrences. We can use the f_group_column(result) operation to group the games based on their results to analyze this situation.

The games went into overtime when the result included "(ot)". In row 1, the result was "26-23 (ot)" and in row 2, the result was "30-24 (ot)". Both games between the Eagles and Giants went into overtime. Therefore, the number of times a game went into overtime between the Eagles and Giants is 2.
